phases.title: Done, Done! Notification

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/harvest.ts
tasks.description:
Modify: Wire `notifyDoneDone` to format and post the summary to Slack.

IMPLEMENTATION INSTRUCTIONS:
1. In `notifyDoneDone()` (src/engine/harvest.ts:253), replace `payload as any` with proper `NotifyPayload` typing from `../server/types.js`.
2. The function already has the correct two-tier approach: try /api/notify first, fall back to dispatchNotification.
3. The `dispatchNotification` import from `../server/slack-notify.js` may throw "Not implemented" if 003-slack is not yet shipped. This is expected — the fetch() fallback to /api/notify is the primary path.

TESTING INSTRUCTIONS:
- Tests are in `src/engine/harvest.test.ts` (the gate runs this file).
- Mock `dispatchNotification` using `vi.mock("../server/slack-notify.js")` to prevent "Not implemented" throws.
- Mock `fetch` (globalThis.fetch) to verify the /api/notify call is made with the correct payload.
- Do NOT depend on 003-slack being implemented. All Slack interactions must be mocked.

GATE: specs/011-harvest/gates/T012-gate.sh (runs harvest.test.ts + biome check)

tasks.description: Modify: Ensure no slack notification is dispatched directly from the webhook to satisfy FR-H11

tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `pnpm vitest run tests/harvest-e2e.test.ts --grep "Done Done notification sent exactly once"` exits 0
